title: Goiania vs Brasilia -> Austin (example)
subtitle: Round-trip · economy · 1 adult · BRL · out Sun 19 Jul 2026 · return Sat 08 Aug 2026

boxes.html: ✓ All fares verified single-ticket on Kayak (one airline, one contract) — no self-transfer risk. Prices are real round-trip fares.
⚠ Constraints: outbound moved to Sun 19/07 (appointment 18/07 AM); weekend travel days only; budget ≤ R$9000.
Duration = longest single leg (bold) + round-trip total; orange = leg ≥ ~21h. Score normalized within each section.

verdict.heading: Verdict - true cost from your door (Goiania)
verdict.note: Every BSB option first needs a GYN↔BSB hop. Counting that as money + 1 stop + time. Ground est: bus ~R$100/leg, ~3h30 + buffer.
verdict.conclusion_html: Door-to-door, BSB round-trip (~R$6.810) ties flying GYN direct (~R$7.128) once the bus + extra connection + pre-flight night are counted. Simpler pick: fly GYN direct, LATAM R$7.128. Choose BSB only for shorter time in the air.

sections.name: Brasilia (BSB)
sections.note: All single-ticket. Three rankings - same flights, different priorities.

sections.name: Goiania (GYN)
sections.note: All single-ticket. GYN has no 1-stop option; many routes connect through BSB anyway.

sections.name: Open-jaw: depart BSB, fly home to GYN
sections.note: Out of BSB, home into GYN (no drive back). Single-ticket only; self-transfer excluded.

how_steps: Click any Kayak button - exact city pair + dates. The matching fare is near the top; match by departure time + airline.
Confirm it shows the expected stop count and is not tagged "Conexao por conta propria" / KAYAK Mix (those are self-transfer).
Book on the airline's own site when the price matches, for best change/cancel protection.
US connection (MIA/ATL/etc): a valid US visa is required regardless; single ticket = bags checked through.
Set a price alert; fares move daily.
